name: Base & Strength
stimulus: Rebuild aerobic base. Introduce speed via hills and strides. Bike for tempo/threshold work. Strength 2x/week.
goals: 2 key sessions/week: 1 run speed + 1 bike threshold

planned.notes: First run of base block.

planned.desc:
Hill repeats
WU: 2km easy
MAIN: 8x10sec steep hill sprint
(walk back recovery)
CD: 4km easy
planned.notes: Power development. Max effort uphill, full recovery.
Strides relaxed, not sprints.

planned.desc:
Bike threshold intervals
WU: 15min Z2
MAIN: 4x5min Z4 (3min Z1 between)
CD: 10min Z1
planned.notes: First threshold work of block. ON THE BIKE — save running legs.
Pre-long run. Keep it short and easy.
First proper long run. Relaxed. Negative split OK.
Easy Sunday ride. Active recovery from long run.

planned.desc:
Fartlek
WU: 2km easy
MAIN: 8x (90sec hard / 90sec easy)
CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: Run by feel. Hard should feel 8/10 effort.

planned.desc:
Strength
45min lower body + core
Squats 3x8, Lunges 3x10, RDL 3x8
Core circuit 3 rounds
planned.notes: Running-specific. Single leg work. Heavy enough to challenge.

planned.desc:
Bike tempo
WU: 15min Z2
MAIN: 2x10min Z3-Z4 (5min Z1 between)
CD: 15min Z1
planned.notes: Build aerobic power on the bike. Push the longer efforts.
Pre-long run. Short and controlled.
Negative split. Last 4km is the training stimulus.

planned.desc:
Endurance ride
2.5hrs Z2
Last 30min push Z3
planned.notes: Sunday ride. Z3 finish if legs feel good.
Absorb week — slightly easier.

planned.desc:
Tempo cruise
WU: 2km easy
MAIN: 3x1.5km @ 4:20-4:30
(90sec jog between)
CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: First real tempo on legs. Should feel smooth, not desperate.

planned.desc:
Strength
45min upper body + core
Push-ups, rows, shoulder press
Plank variations, hip stability
planned.notes: Upper body + core. Support posture for long runs.
Easy day. Absorb the week's work.
Pre-long run. Easy.
Longest run of the block. Last 5km is controlled push. Block review after.
Block done. Spin easy. Assess readiness for speed block.
